name: PutCreditSpreadStrategy
description: Mildly bullish / neutral options strategy. Sells an OTM put and buys a further OTM put for defined risk. Profits from time decay and rising prices.

shortDelta.description: Target delta for the short put (0.20 = 20-delta)

longDelta.description: Target delta for the long put (0.10 = 10-delta)
